ddls:
CREATE TABLE "award_types" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award type */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award type (e.g., MSc, MA) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the student category (e.g., UK/EU, Overseas) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the student category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program (e.g., Education (Hong Kong)) */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award ID */,
  "duration_in_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "duration_type" TEXT /* Type of duration (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the program */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES award_types ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program ID */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the prospective student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the prospective student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the prospective student */,
  "inquiry_details" TEXT /* Details of the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_inquiries_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program ID */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each award type
Name of the award type (e.g., MSc, MA)
Unique identifier for each student category
Name of the student category (e.g., UK/EU, Overseas)
Name of the program (e.g., Education (Hong Kong))
Duration of the program in years
Contact email for inquiries about the program
Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive, suspended)
Email address of the prospective student
Phone number of the prospective student
Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive, withdrawn)
